name: Perusall
description: Perusall is a useful annotation surface inside Religion & Belief Systems.
whyUseIt: People in Religion & Belief Systems use Perusall to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using Perusall as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from Perusall.
